Acclaimed author Isabel Allende isn’t interested in retirement. “You retire from a job, but you don’t retire from a passion. Writers write until they can’t write anymore. Painters paint until they fall apart. Who retires from art?” Now 81, she continues to spend her days crafting new stories and running the Isabel Allende Foundation. - THE CUT
